Home › Lake County › Nut-Aware Restaurants

Nut-Aware Restaurants in Lake County

11 restaurants with nut-aware options in Lake County, every one graded from its most recent Florida DBPR inspection. 5 currently hold an A, on an average 4.2-star diner rating.

11 nut-aware restaurants

  • A 100 O
    OUTBACK STEAKHOUSE American ★ 4.2 (3337) Leesburg · Lake County GFDF +5 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 99 A
    APPLEBEES NEIGHBORHOOD GRILL & BAR American ★ 4 (2367) The Villages · Lake County VegGF +5 more Inspected Oct 2025
  • A 97 F
    FIVE GUYS American ★ 4.5 (1518) Mount Dora · Lake County Nut-aware Inspected Nov 2025
  • A 95 C
    CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL 2120 Mexican ★ 3.5 (1378) Mount Dora · Lake County VegGF +6 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 94 M
    MISSION BBQ LADY LAKE Other ★ 4.7 (1572) Lady Lake · Lake County GFDF +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • C 78 A
    APPLEBEES NEIGHBORHOOD GRILL & BAR American ★ 4.1 (2107) Eustis · Lake County GFDF +4 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • C 77 A
    APPLEBEE'S NEIGHBORHOOD GRILL & BAR American ★ 3.9 (2008) Clermont · Lake County Nut-aware Inspected Mar 2026
  • C 71 F
    FIRST WATCH RESTAURANT Other ★ 4.5 (1767) Clermont · Lake County VeganVeg +3 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • D 68 C
    CASTAWAYS RESTAURANT Seafood ★ 4.4 (1676) Astor · Lake County GFDF +5 more Inspected May 2026
  • F 46 C
    COPACABANA CUBAN CAFE Cuban ★ 4.1 (2698) Mount Dora · Lake County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • F 46 R
    ROBATA JAPANESE STEAKHOUSE Japanese ★ 4.2 (1351) Clermont · Lake County VegGF +6 more Inspected Apr 2026
